name: Beshbarmak
description: Traditional boiled meat served with noodles.

name: Kuurdak
description: A traditional Central Asian dish made from fried meat (usually lamb, beef, or horse meat) cooked with onions and potatoes. It is known for its rich flavor and hearty nature.

name: Manty
description: Steamed dumplings filled with minced meat and onions, commonly served with sour cream or a spicy sauce.

name: Lagman
description: A noodle dish made with hand-pulled noodles, vegetables, and meat in a flavorful broth or sauce.

name: Plov
description: A rice dish cooked with meat, carrots, onions, and spices, popular throughout Central Asia.

name: Boorsok
description: Small pieces of fried dough traditionally served with tea, honey, or jam during celebrations and gatherings.

name: Kymyz
description: A traditional fermented drink made from mare's milk, valued for its unique taste and cultural importance.
